ddls:
CREATE TABLE "studies" (
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each study */,
  "study_name" TEXT /* Name of the study */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the study */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the study */,
  "objective" TEXT /* Objective of the study */,
  "principal_investigator_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the principal investigator of the study */,
  "funding_source" TEXT /* Source of funding for the study */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the study (e.g., ongoing, completed, planned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_studies_principal_investigator_id FOREIGN KEY ("principal_investigator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the participant is involved in */,
  "age_group" TEXT /* Age group of the participant */,
  "hiv_test_past_12m" INTEGER /* Number of participants who had an HIV test in the past 12 months */,
  "hiv_test_none" INTEGER /* Number of participants with no HIV test */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the participant */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the participant */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the participant */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the participant (e.g., phone, email) */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the participant */,
  "enrollment_date" TEXT /* Date the participant was enrolled in the study */,
  "consent_status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's consent (e.g., given, pending, declined) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the participant */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the participant */,
  "education_level" TEXT /* Education level of the participant */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the participant */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the participant */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the participant */,
  "number_of_children" INTEGER /* Number of children the participant has */,
  "smoking_status" TEXT /* Smoking status of the participant (e.g., smoker, non-smoker) */,
  "alcohol_consumption" TEXT /* Alcohol consumption habits of the participant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "odds_ratios" (
  "odds_ratio_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each odds ratio entry */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the participant associated with the odds ratio */,
  "unadjusted_or" REAL /* Unadjusted odds ratio */,
  "unadjusted_ci_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for the unadjusted OR */,
  "unadjusted_ci_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for the unadjusted OR */,
  "adjusted_or" REAL /* Adjusted odds ratio */,
  "adjusted_ci_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for the adjusted OR */,
  "adjusted_ci_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for the adjusted OR */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variable associated with the odds ratio */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to calculate the odds ratio */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used in the calculation */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value associated with the odds ratio */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level for the confidence intervals (e.g., 95%) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("odds_ratio_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_ratios_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_odds_ratios_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "variables" (
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each variable */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the variable is associated with */,
  "variable_name" TEXT /* Name of the variable */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the variable */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Data type of the variable (e.g., categorical, continuous) */,
  "measurement_unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the variable (e.g., years, percentage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("variable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_variables_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "confounders" (
  "confounder_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each confounder */,
  "variable_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the variable the confounder is associated with */,
  "confounder_name" TEXT /* Name of the confounder */,
  "effect_size" REAL /* Estimated effect size of the confounder */,
  "adjustment_method" TEXT /* Method used to adjust for the confounder */,
  "reference_group" TEXT /* Reference group used in the adjustment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("confounder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_confounders_variable_id FOREIGN KEY ("variable_id") REFERENCES variables ("variable_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "adjustments" (
  "adjustment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each adjustment */,
  "odds_ratio_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the odds ratio being adjusted */,
  "confounder_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the confounder used in the adjustment */,
  "adjusted_or" REAL /* Adjusted odds ratio after accounting for the confounder */,
  "adjusted_ci_low" REAL /* Lower bound of the 95% confidence interval for the adjusted OR */,
  "adjusted_ci_high" REAL /* Upper bound of the 95% confidence interval for the adjusted OR */,
  "adjustment_method" TEXT /* Method used to adjust the odds ratio */,
  "sample_size" INTEGER /* Sample size used in the adjustment */,
  "p_value" REAL /* P-value associated with the adjusted odds ratio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("adjustment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_confounder_id FOREIGN KEY ("confounder_id") REFERENCES confounders ("confounder_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_adjustments_odds_ratio_id FOREIGN KEY ("odds_ratio_id") REFERENCES odds_ratios ("odds_ratio_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the report is based on */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "generation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the report document */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., summary, detailed) */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Summary of the report findings */,
  "published" INTEGER /* Whether the report has been published */,
  "publication_date" TEXT /* Date the report was published */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, epidemiologist, admin) */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the system */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who accessed the system */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of access */,
  "actions_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken by the user during the access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the access device */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Duration of the access session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_quality" (
  "quality_check_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data quality check */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the check is performed on */,
  "check_date" TEXT /* Date the check was performed */,
  "check_type" TEXT /* Type of data quality check */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the check (e.g., passed, failed) */,
  "executor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the check */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments or notes about the check */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("quality_check_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_quality_executor_id FOREIGN KEY ("executor_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user the permission is assigned to */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the permission applies to */,
  "access_level" TEXT /* Level of access granted (e.g., view, edit, admin) */,
  "granted_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who granted the permission */,
  "granted_date" TEXT /* Date the permission was granted */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_granted_by FOREIGN KEY ("granted_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "collaborations" (
  "collaboration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each collaboration */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study involved in the collaboration */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user participating in the collaboration */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the collaboration */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the collaboration */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the collaboration */,
  "collaboration_type" TEXT /* Type of collaboration (e.g., research, data analysis) */,
  "contribution" TEXT /* Description of the user's contribution to the collaboration */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("collaboration_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_collaborations_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sharing" (
  "sharing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data sharing agreement */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the agreement is for */,
  "recipient_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the recipient of the shared data */,
  "sharing_date" TEXT /* Date the data was shared */,
  "terms" TEXT /* Terms of the data sharing agreement */,
  "shared_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who shared the data */,
  "shared_with" TEXT /* Reference to the user or organization the data was shared with */,
  "sharing_purpose" TEXT /* Purpose of the data sharing */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sharing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_recipient_id FOREIGN KEY ("recipient_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_sharing_shared_by FOREIGN KEY ("shared_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "versioning" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "study_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the study the version is for */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the study */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "changes_description" TEXT /* Description of changes made in the version */,
  "released_by" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who released the version */,
  "release_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the changes in the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_released_by FOREIGN KEY ("released_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_versioning_study_id FOREIGN KEY ("study_id") REFERENCES studies ("study_id")
)
